function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "claudia@helios-tax.example"
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_29__eur_000550__inv_0011__helios_followup_support_invoice.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Attached is the invoice issued on 2026-03-29 (INV-0011) from Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed once as required. Verification: attachment path was previously read; single attachment so newest-first satisfied; recipient matches canonical claudia primary_contact_email; subject quoting handled. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md with the requested invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit check: Task was 'Handle the next inbox item.' I processed the lowest inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md, verified sender identity canonically, read the requested source invoice, created one durable outbound email draft in outbox with the exact requested attachment, then deleted the processed inbox file. Completeness: only one inbox item existed and it is now handled.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the requested resend workflow.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing an outbound resend draft to Claudia with the requested 2026-03-29 Helios invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, AGENTS, context), read required workflow docs for inbox processing + email sending, used inbox frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, verified sender against entity primary_contact_email, read source attachment before outbound action, performed single outbox write, then deleted completed inbox item per inbox-processing v2.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical inbox email requested resend of the invoice dated 2026-03-29; canonical entity record for Claudia matched sender address; requested invoice file existed and was read; outbound draft was created with exact workspace attachment path; inbox file was deleted only after completion.
